---
title : "A Longitudinal Study of the Bidirectional Causal Relationships between Online Political Participation and Offline Collective Action"
date : "2021-08-01"
author : "Chayinska, Maria; Miranda, Daniel & Gonzalez, Roberto"
categories : ["Journal Article"]
publication : "Computers in Human Behavior, 121 106810  [https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chb.2021.106810](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chb.2021.106810)"
publication_short : "Computers in Human Behavior, 121 106810  [https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chb.2021.106810](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chb.2021.106810)"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Chayinska, Maria; Miranda, Daniel & Gonzalez, Roberto (2021). *A Longitudinal Study of the Bidirectional Causal Relationships between Online Political Participation and Offline Collective Action*. Computers in Human Behavior, 121 106810  [https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chb.2021.106810](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chb.2021.106810)

:::
